title: Amethyst Geodes Decoratives
description: This mod adds new bricks for Amethyst Blocks, Calcite, and Smooth Basalt. With this, there are stairs, slabs, and chiseled/specialty brick types.
body:
A simple mod that adds decorative Polished Amethyst, Amethyst Bricks, and other various decorative blocks from Amethyst Geodes. Many more decorative blocks planned for the future.

At the moment, there are polished blocks for amethyst, as well as bricks for Calcite, Basalt, and Amethyst. There are stairs, and slabs currently but I do plan on adding more in the future.
